Title: Grosse, Ernst
Overview: Together with Ernst Diez and Curt Glaser, Grosse established the theoretic foundation for Asian art in the German-speaking world (Metzler).
Selected Bibliography: The Beginnings of Art. New York: D. Appleton, 1928; Kunstwissenschaftliche Studien. Tübingen: Mohr, 1900; Die ostasiatische Tuschmalerei. Berlin: B. Cassirer, 1923.
